title: [MTR3/4] 回転寿司 | Conveyor Belt Sushi
description: Bringing Conveyor Belt Sushi into Minecraft.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
Conveyor belt sushi (Japanese: 回転寿司) is a type of sushi restaurant. Plates of sushi are put on a conveyor belt and it moves past each table within the restaurant. However things to be put on the conveyor belt is not limited to sushi, depending on the restaurant. 

# What will be in this pack?
1. Conveyor belt rail
2. Conveyor belt sushi

# Sushi offered in this pack (you may expand the lineup if necessary)
## Hosomaki
1. Salmon
2. Cucumber / *Kappamaki*
3. Tuna / *Tekkamaki*
## Nigiri
1. Salmon
2. Yellowtail
3. Shrimp
4. Sweet egg / *Tamago*
5. Grilled Salmon
6. Tuna
## Gunkanmaki
1. Sea Urchin
2. *Ikura*
